product_overview: Trendyol is a Next.js frontend that lets users sign up/sign in, create profit analyses for products, view recent analyses on a dashboard, and manage account settings including notifications and appearance.
core_goals: Provide secure email/password authentication via Supabase so users can access private analysis data.
Allow authenticated users to create profit analyses (price, cost, commission) and view computed margins.
Surface recent analyses and key stats on a dashboard with links to detailed analysis pages.
Enable users to manage account preferences (dark mode, email notifications) and test notification delivery.
Keep public marketing and pricing pages for conversion and upgrade paths.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign up and sign in using email and password via the /auth route and Supabase; supports toggling between Login and Register modes and displays success/error messages.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Toggle between Login and Register tabs -> Fill Email field -> Fill Password field -> Click Submit button -> See success message -> Redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /auth -> Toggle to Login tab -> Fill Email field -> Fill Password field -> Click Submit button -> See success message -> Redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /auth -> Toggle to Register tab -> Fill invalid Email field -> Fill Password field -> Click Submit button -> See error message indicating invalid email
Navigate to /auth -> Toggle to Login tab -> Fill Email field -> Fill wrong Password -> Click Submit button -> See error message indicating invalid credentials
Navigate to /auth -> Fill Email field -> Fill Password field -> Click Submit button -> See network/server error message if POST /auth/v1/token or /auth/v1/signup fails

features.name: Create Profit Analysis
features.description: Create a new profit analysis at /analysis/new by selecting a marketplace and entering product details (name, price, cost, commission), then calculate to view margins.
user_flows: Navigate to /analysis/new -> Select Marketplace -> Enter Product Name -> Enter Price -> Enter Cost -> Enter Commission -> Click Calculate button -> See computed analysis results (margins, fees) displayed

Navigate to /analysis/new -> Select Marketplace -> Enter Product Name -> Enter Price -> Enter Cost -> Leave Commission blank -> Click Calculate button -> See computed analysis results using default commission if applicable
Navigate to /analysis/new -> Select Marketplace -> Leave Price field empty -> Enter Cost -> Enter Commission -> Click Calculate button -> See validation error indicating Price is required
Navigate to /analysis/new -> Select Marketplace -> Enter non-numeric Price -> Enter Cost -> Enter Commission -> Click Calculate button -> See validation error indicating numeric input required

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Authenticated dashboard at /dashboard shows stats cards and a list of recent analyses; clicking an analysis opens its detailed view (/analysis/[id]).
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See stats cards summarizing analyses and key metrics -> Recent analyses list loads via GET /rest/v1/analyses -> Click on a recent analysis item -> Navigate to /analysis/[id] -> See detailed analysis view
Navigate to /dashboard -> See stats cards -> Click a recent analysis item -> See loading state while GET /rest/v1/analyses detail is fetched -> See detailed analysis
Navigate to /dashboard while not authenticated -> See redirect to /auth or authentication prompt
Navigate to /dashboard -> GET /rest/v1/analyses returns error -> See error message or empty state indicating analyses could not be loaded

features.name: Settings Management
features.description: Manage account preferences at /settings including toggling dark mode, toggling email notifications, and sending a test notification via API.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Toggle Dark Mode -> See UI switch to dark theme immediately
Navigate to /settings -> Toggle Email Notifications -> Click Save/Apply if present -> See confirmation that notification preference was updated
Navigate to /settings -> Click Send Test Email button -> POST to /api/notifications/test-email -> See success toast/message confirming test email sent

Navigate to /settings -> Toggle Email Notifications -> Save preference -> Backend returns validation/type error (e.g. missing email_notifications_enabled field) -> See error message explaining update failed
Navigate to /settings while not authenticated -> See redirect to /auth or authentication required message

routes.description: Landing page with product introduction and CTA
User dashboard showing recent analyses and stats
List of saved products and detailed data
Form to create a new profit analysis
Detailed view of a specific analysis result
User settings for profile, notifications, and appearance
